extraction.one_line_summary: BERNAL Egan took virtual lead on Col de l'Iseran with solo attack catching break, but stage cancelled due to snowstorm/landslide, GC taken at summit.
tactical_patterns: INEOS isolated ALAPHILIPPE by setting tempo with 7km to summit, exploiting lack of Deceuninck teammates before attacks began.
THOMAS attacked first at 6km to go, forcing ALAPHILIPPE to respond repeatedly before BERNAL's winning move.
BERNAL launched counterattack after THOMAS was caught, exploiting moment when group reformed and rivals hesitated.
VALVERDE/URAN in 9th-10th GC both made early break within 6min deficit, revealing aggressive tactic for penultimate positions.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: at 22 years old, dropped entire break including YATES in final 2km of Iseran, gaining 2min on ALAPHILIPPE.
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: abandoned with thigh muscle injury from team car while in 5th GC before key mountain stage.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: strong enough to launch first attack at 6km but couldn't sustain, visibly relieved at stage cancellation.
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: isolated without teammates, cracked when INEOS set tempo, lost 2min to BERNAL despite responding to THOMAS attacks.
rider_signals.KRUIJSWIJK Steven: negative: unable to follow BERNAL's acceleration, stuck in chase group losing nearly 1min to new race leader.
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: paying for Stage 18 efforts, dropped from yellow jersey group 7km from Iseran summit.
